visual_checklist_notes.reference_match: The generated drawing still visibly differs from the same-name reference drawing in composition, annotation pattern, and sheet treatment.
visual_checklist_notes.view_layout: The generated view arrangement has shifted to a different front/side/projected layout and does not match the reference view distribution.
visual_checklist_notes.display_dimensions: Structured evidence still reports generated DisplayDim below the reference floor and missing post-layout reference-intent target coverage.
visual_checklist_notes.dimension_readability: Dimension placement remains dense and clustered around the generated primary/projected views, with several callouts difficult to read at the UI review scale.
visual_checklist_notes.title_block: The generated sheet still contains a non-reference title block/table area and does not match the compact reference treatment.
visual_checklist_notes.manufacturing_notes: Manufacturing notes, blue technical annotations, and reference-style warning/requirements are not reproduced in the same layout or completeness.

visual_findings: The generated 006 output is fresh from run drw_output/runs/cd5d8212fb17, but it is not visually acceptable.
The generated drawing does not match the same-name reference layout and view distribution.
The generated drawing has different dimension grouping and remains hard to read as a manufacturing drawing.
The generated drawing remains below the reference DisplayDim floor and lacks proven post-layout target coverage.
Title block/template treatment and manufacturing notes remain visibly different from the reference.
entries.required_next_action: Revise 006 generation to preserve reference-intent SolidWorks DisplayDim targets through post-layout final export, match the reference layout/title block/notes, then rerun exactly one locked 006 CAD cycle and repeat Drawing Review UI screenshot judgement.

acceptance_rule: A drawing is not accepted until the application Drawing Review UI screenshot is visually judged PASS against the same-name reference drawing with every required checklist item true.
